tasks.subject: Task 1: Tier 1a — Low-noise strict tsconfig flags
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Enable noImplicitReturns, noFallthroughCasesInSwitch, noImplicitOverride, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters and fix the 3 errors they surface.

**Files:** tsconfig.json; src/components/SyncStatusIndicator.tsx (effect ~L61 add `return undefined;`); src/screens/EventDetailScreen.tsx (effect ~L113 add `return undefined;`); components/ui/form-control/index.tsx (delete dead formControlLabelAstrickStyle L72-81).

**Acceptance Criteria:** 5 flags present; `npm run typecheck` 0 errors; only explicit return undefined added to effects.

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck && npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tsconfig.json", "src/components/SyncStatusIndicator.tsx", "src/screens/EventDetailScreen.tsx", "components/ui/form-control/index.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 flags present in tsconfig.json", "typecheck 0 errors", "only explicit return undefined added to effects"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Tier 1b — noUncheckedIndexedAccess
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Enable noUncheckedIndexedAccess and fix 46 errors (8 source, 38 tests).

**Files:** tsconfig.json; source: calendarColor.ts(2), monthUtils.ts(1), avatarColor.ts(1), CreateEventScreen.tsx(1), CreateCalendarScreen.tsx(1), useCalendarsListData.ts(1), CustomTabBar.tsx(1); tests: useScheduleFeed.test.ts(19), monthUtils.test.ts(7), useWeekPages.test.ts(5), useMonthPages.test.ts(4), useDragStore.test.ts(2), useCalendarsListData.test.ts(1).

**Acceptance Criteria:** flag set; typecheck 0 errors; tests pass with no weakened assertions; `!` only where provably in-bounds.

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck && npm run test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tsconfig.json", "src/utils/calendarColor.ts", "src/utils/monthUtils.ts", "src/utils/avatarColor.ts", "src/screens/CreateEventScreen.tsx", "src/screens/CreateCalendarScreen.tsx", "src/hooks/useCalendarsListData.ts", "src/components/schedule/CustomTabBar.tsx", "src/hooks/__tests__/useScheduleFeed.test.ts", "src/utils/__tests__/monthUtils.test.ts", "src/components/schedule/week-strip/__tests__/useWeekPages.test.ts", "src/components/schedule/month-grid/__tests__/useMonthPages.test.ts", "src/stores/__tests__/useDragStore.test.ts", "src/hooks/__tests__/useCalendarsListData.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck && npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["noUncheckedIndexedAccess true", "typecheck 0 errors", "tests pass no weakened assertions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Tier 1c — exactOptionalPropertyTypes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Enable exactOptionalPropertyTypes and fix 14 errors at component-prop and PowerSync-update boundaries.

**Files:** tsconfig.json; App.tsx(107), EditGroupCard.tsx(58,76), CalendarContainer.tsx(111,113), EventCard.tsx(33,39), EventFeed.tsx(141,156), CalendarDetailScreen.tsx(157), CalendarsScreen.tsx(422), CreateCalendarScreen.tsx(604), CreateEventScreen.tsx(169), database/connector.ts(190).

**Acceptance Criteria:** flag set; typecheck 0 errors; tests pass.

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck && npm run test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tsconfig.json", "App.tsx", "src/components/calendars/EditGroupCard.tsx", "src/components/schedule/CalendarContainer.tsx", "src/components/schedule/EventCard.tsx", "src/components/schedule/EventFeed.tsx", "src/screens/CalendarDetailScreen.tsx", "src/screens/CalendarsScreen.tsx", "src/screens/CreateCalendarScreen.tsx", "src/screens/CreateEventScreen.tsx", "src/database/connector.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck && npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exactOptionalPropertyTypes true", "typecheck 0 errors", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Tier 2a — Type-aware ESLint infra + async-safety rules
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert eslint.config.js to type-aware flat config via typescript-eslint; enable no-floating-promises and no-misused-promises as errors and fix all.

**Files:** package.json, package-lock.json, eslint.config.js, source files with floating/misused promises.

**Acceptance Criteria:** typescript-eslint installed with projectService:true; both async rules error; lint 0 errors; *.js exempt.

**Verify:** `npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "package-lock.json", "eslint.config.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["typescript-eslint projectService:true", "async rules error", "lint 0 errors", "*.js exempt from type-aware rules"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Tier 2b — Strict type-safety ESLint rules
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Enable strictTypeChecked type-safety rules (no-unsafe-*, no-unnecessary-condition, await-thenable, restrict-template-expressions, switch-exhaustiveness-check) as errors and fix all.

**Files:** eslint.config.js, source files flagged.

**Acceptance Criteria:** rules are error; lint 0 errors; no blanket eslint-disable.

**Verify:** `npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["eslint.config.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["strict type-safety rules error", "lint 0 errors", "no blanket disable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Tier 2c — Stylistic type-checked rules + consistent type imports
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add stylisticTypeChecked ergonomics and enforce consistent-type-imports. Lower priority.

**Files:** eslint.config.js, source imports (mostly auto-fixable).

**Acceptance Criteria:** consistent-type-imports error; stylistic rules green; lint 0 errors after --fix.

**Verify:** `npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["eslint.config.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["consistent-type-imports error", "stylistic rules green", "lint 0 errors after fix"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Tier 3a — Promote no-explicit-any and exhaustive-deps to error
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Turn the two warn rules into error and fix outstanding violations.

**Files:** eslint.config.js, source files with any or hook-dep issues.

**Acceptance Criteria:** both rules error; lint 0 errors; exhaustive-deps fixes add real deps not suppressions.

**Verify:** `npm run lint && npm run test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["eslint.config.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run lint && npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no-explicit-any and exhaustive-deps error", "lint 0 errors", "real dep fixes not suppressions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Tier 3b — Import-cycle and import-order enforcement
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add eslint-plugin-import-x to catch circular deps and enforce import ordering.

**Files:** package.json, package-lock.json, eslint.config.js, knip.config.ts, source files with cycles/ordering.

**Acceptance Criteria:** import-x wired with TS resolver; no-cycle and order error; lint 0 errors; knip passes.

**Verify:** `npm run lint && npm run knip`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "package-lock.json", "eslint.config.js", "knip.config.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run lint && npm run knip", "acceptanceCriteria": ["import-x wired with TS resolver", "no-cycle and order error", "lint 0 errors", "knip passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Tier 3c — Close CI gaps (Knip in CI + ts-reset)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make Knip a CI gate, add it to local check, and adopt @total-typescript/ts-reset for safer lib types.

**Files:** .github/workflows/ci.yml, package.json, package-lock.json, src/types/ts-reset.d.ts (new), knip.config.ts, source files flagged by ts-reset.

**Acceptance Criteria:** CI runs knip and fails on findings; check includes knip; ts-reset imported once; typecheck passes with ts-reset types.

**Verify:** `npm run check && npm run knip`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml", "package.json", "package-lock.json", "src/types/ts-reset.d.ts", "knip.config.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run check && npm run knip", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CI runs knip fails on findings", "check includes knip", "ts-reset imported once", "typecheck passes with ts-reset"]}
```
